notes: Reference run. EXCEEDS 16MB budget (19.4MB). val_bpb 1.1894, beats leaderboard 1.2244 but over budget.
Budget-compliant baseline. EBT disabled. Apples-to-apples comparison target.
EBT v1: K=4 r=64 aux=0.5 noise=0.1. Trails baseline by 0.0072 BPB on wallclock; AHEAD by 0.0085 per-step at step 12000. 9% slower steps cost ~1200 warmdown steps.
EARLY-KILLED partial run. refinement collapsed (relchange~0.001), perstep ~+0.003 BPB worse than baseline. No signal that refinement helps with light regularization.
K=2 same wallclock-quality as K=4 v1. After warmdown, EBT crosses ahead of baseline (step12000: EBT 1.240 vs base 1.242). Final still trails by 0.0068 due to step deficit.
Best EBT so far: K=8 eta=0.05 aux=0.3 noise=0.05. Trails baseline by 0.0047 BPB on wallclock. Per-step at step 11000 only +0.003 vs base — much tighter than v1/v3 (+0.024).
8xH100 SXM5, 600s wallclock. Sets new bar: val_bpb 1.2237 (beats leaderboard 1.2244).
8xH100 SXM5, 600s. BEATS baseline by 0.0026 BPB (1.2211 vs 1.2237). K_eval ablation: K=8 best at 1.2216.
